mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_common_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT seq_shelter_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ddd_user ( user_number, user_type, user_id, user_password, user_name, user_nickname, user_gender, user_birth, user_phone, user_email ) VALUES ( #{userNumber}, #{userType}, #{userId}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userNickname}, #{userGender}, #{userBirth}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail} )
INSERT INTO ddd_user_shelter (user_number, shelter_name, shelter_business_number, shelter_address) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{shelterName}, #{shelterBusinessNumber}, #{shelterAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT user_number, user_nickname, user_type FROM ddd_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_password = #{userPassword} AND user_type = #{userType} AND user_status= 'kind'
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_nickname = #{userNickname}
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_email = #{userEmail}
SELECT user_id, user_name, user_birth, user_nickname, user_email, user_phone, user_gender FROM ddd_user WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C'

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_nickname, u.user_name, u.user_phone,u.user_birth,u.user_email, c.common_report_count FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_common c ON u.user_number = c.user_number WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'S'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT u.user_number, u.user_id, s.shelter_name, u.user_phone, u.user_email, s.shelter_certification FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON u.user_number = s.user_number WHERE u.user_type = 'S' ORDER BY s.shelter_certification ASC, u.user_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT u.user_id, s.shelter_name, u.user_nickname, s.shelter_address, s.shelter_business_number, s.shelter_certification FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON u.user_number = s.user_number WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user_shelter SET shelter_certification = 'Y' WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
